title: ADULT TREATMENT CENTER - 211info
text: FORA HEALTH ADULT TREATMENT CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers Dual Diagnosis Treatment (DDT) facility including withdrawal management (detox), Medications for Addiction Treatment (MAT), and residential treatment including medically-monitored residential treatment, outpatient, intensive outpatient, and DUII. For patients in treatment, we offer peer mentors and family therapy. 10230 SE Cherry Blossom Drive Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Age 18 and older with primary diagnosis of alcohol or drug addictive disorders Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30am, Saturday 7:30am-noon Withdrawal Management: Monday-Sunday 7:30am walk up MAT: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Outpatient enrollment: Tuesday 2pm-4pm, Thursday 10:30am-2pm, Friday 11am-noon Weekends: OHP patients only Email (503) 535-1151 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 535-1151 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Intake appointments take approximately 2.5 hours. FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance plans DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus 15-stop 10500 Block SE Cherry Blossom; Bus 20 stops SE Washington & 105th Street and SE Stark & 105th; MAX green line stop SE Main Street Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Diversion Programs DUI Offender Programs Integrated Co-Occurring Disorders Treatment Peer Counseling * Substance Use Disorder Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - DETOX SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - OUTPATIENT MEDICATIONS TO TREAT ADDICTION SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FORA HEALTH
